title: calochortus nuttallii var. bruneaunis
intro: Calochortus nuttallii var. bruneaunis, commonly known as the Foothill Mariposa Lily or Brown-eyed Mariposa Lily, is a perennial plant species in the lily family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calochortus nuttallii var. bruneaunis include wound healing, treating skin conditions, and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
